summary: Completed backend API testing for Task Transfer & Immediate RCA Flow feature. All 19 backend tests passed (100% success rate). Frontend UI testing blocked by login form automation issues - manual testing or login form investigation required.

backend_issues.notes: All backend APIs working correctly. No issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: Playwright automation unable to successfully login with tech/tech123 credentials. Username field appears to retain 'admin' value despite attempts to clear and fill with 'tech'. Password field shows validation error 'Please fill out this field' even after filling.
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks automated UI testing of all authenticated pages
ui_bugs.reproduction: 1. Navigate to login page 2. Attempt to clear username field and type 'tech' 3. Fill password field with 'tech123' 4. Click 'SIGN IN TO CONTROL ROOM' button 5. Form validation error appears
ui_bugs.notes: Manual login with tech/tech123 may work, but automated testing is blocked. Possible causes: form validation logic, JavaScript event handlers, or field clearing issues.

passed_tests: Backend: Tech claims unassigned Work Order
Backend: Tech transfers Work Order to another technician
Backend: Cannot claim already-assigned Work Order (400 error)
Backend: Cannot assign to same current assignee (400 error)
Backend: Tech self-claims unassigned PM task
Backend: Cannot claim already-assigned PM task (400 error)
Backend: Close breakdown with >30 min downtime triggers RCA (rca_required=true, rca_task_id returned, rca_assigned_to=tech)
Backend: RCA task is locked - cannot transfer (400 error with lock message)
Backend: RCA task is locked - cannot claim (400 error with lock message)
Backend: Close breakdown with <30 min downtime - no RCA triggered (rca_required=false)

items.description: Investigate login form behavior - username field not clearing properly in automation, password validation error appearing despite field being filled. Test manual login with tech/tech123 to confirm credentials work.
items.affected_component: Login form (username/password inputs, SIGN IN button)
items.suggested_fix: Check form validation logic, ensure username field can be properly cleared/filled, verify password field validation triggers correctly

items.description: Once login is fixed, complete UI testing for: (1) PM page - unassigned PM shows 'Claim for Me' + 'Assign To...' controls, assigned-to-me shows 'Transfer To...' (2) Work Orders modal - unassigned shows claim/assign, claimed shows transfer, RCA shows locked banner (3) Immediate RCA flow - breakdown closure >30min triggers immediate-rca-dialog (4) Breakdown actions - claim/assign/transfer controls
items.test_data_testids: pm-claim-*, pm-assign-select-*, pm-transfer-select-*, wo-detail-claim-btn, wo-detail-assign-select, wo-detail-transfer-select, wo-detail-rca-locked, immediate-rca-dialog, rca-form-body, bd-claim-btn-*, bd-tech-assign-select-*, bd-transfer-*
